source_jobs.title: Software Engineer - TypeScript
source_jobs.description:
At Rollstack, we are revolutionizing the way businesses share and communicate data and insights. Organizations worldwide rely on slide decks and documents to make informed decisions, whether for leadership, clients, or partners. Yet, preparing these materials often consumes countless hours. Rollstack fully automates that.

We help some of the world's leading organizations, from mid-sized to public companies like SoFi, Zillow, and Whirlpool, in automating their slide decks and documents. Headquartered in New York, we offer a remote-friendly workplace and are backed by Insight Partners and Y Combinator, the most successful startup incubator in the world that produced the likes of Airbnb, Twitch, Instacart, Dropbox, Reddit, DoorDash, Stripe, Coinbase, etc.

Our team operates with speed and focus to deliver outsized impacts for our customers. We approach every challenge with first principles, never assuming things have to be done a certain way. We are a diverse team that believes intelligence and kindness go hand in hand, welcoming individuals from all backgrounds. Our persistence and rapid execution define us as a category leader and a future generational company.




ABOUT THE ROLE

As a Software Engineer at Rollstack, you’ll build core features that automate how companies share data through slides and documents. You’ll work across the stack on integrations, AI insights, and performance optimization. This role is ideal for engineers who thrive on impact, autonomy, and fast-paced product development.




AS A SOFTWARE ENGINEER, YOU WILL

 - Help build the missing piece of the modern data stack: Reporting Automation

 - Build new user-facing features with everything from database models to async workflows and UI components.

 - Develop features like AI insights, native charts, and collections.

 - Optimize our data synchronization by leveraging better technologies and protocols.

 - Build integrations with BI tools like Tableau, Looker, and Metabase.

 - Build integrations with content platforms like Google Slides, PowerPoint, and Notion.

 - Define and implement best practices with the latest web technologies across the stack.




TECH STACK

 - TypeScript + React frontend with Tailwind CSS and Shadcn/UI, using modern hooks for composable UI and fast iteration.

 - Node.js backend with a sync engine using Prisma ORM and Temporal workflows, powering internal services.

 - K8s platform on AWS, deployed with Argo CD for zero‑downtime releases and easy rollbacks.

 - Logs in SigNoz, application tracing in Sentry, and product analytics in PostHog.

 - Generative‑AI layer powered by OpenAI API, Gemini, LangChain, and Langfuse to deliver automated insights.

 - Issue tracking with Linear.




WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

 - 3–8 years of relevant professional experience following graduation.

 - Recent hands-on TypeScript experience with at least the past 2 years spent building production applications.

 - 2+ years of backend development experience in Node.js, working on scalable services or APIs.

 - 2+ years of frontend development experience using React, delivering high-quality user interfaces.

 - Strong software engineering fundamentals, including a solid grasp of algorithms, data structures, and system design principles.

 - Proven track record of cross-functional collaboration with product managers, designers, and fellow engineers to deliver new products and features.

 - Good understanding of CI/CD pipelines and cloud infrastructure, with practical experience deploying and maintaining applications.




WHY JOIN US

 - We are backed by the best (Y Combinator, Insight Partners ...) and are redefining how individuals and teams, across industries and around the world, work smarter and faster.

 - Work alongside an exceptional team of builders, including alumni from Amazon, Meta, Pinterest, Tesla, and AiFi.

 - Be part of a fully remote, globally diverse workplace that values ownership, impact, and collaboration.

 - Contribute to a produc

source_jobs.title: Product Marketing Manager
source_jobs.description:
At Rollstack, we are revolutionizing the way businesses share and communicate data and insights. Organizations worldwide rely on slide decks and documents to make informed decisions, whether for leadership, clients, or partners. Yet, preparing these materials often consumes countless hours. Rollstack fully automates that.

We help some of the world's leading organizations, from mid-sized to public companies like SoFi, Zillow, and Whirlpool, automate their slide decks and documents. Headquartered in New York, we offer a remote-friendly workplace and are backed by Insight Partners and Y Combinator, the most successful startup incubator in the world that produced companies like Airbnb, Twitch, Instacart, Dropbox, Reddit, Doordash, Stripe, and Coinbase.

Our team operates with speed and focus to deliver outsized impact for our customers. We approach every challenge with first principles, never assuming things have to be done a certain way. We are a diverse team that believes intelligence and kindness go hand in hand, welcoming individuals from all backgrounds. Our persistence and rapid execution define us as a category leader and a future generational company.




ABOUT THE ROLE

Rollstack is seeking a Product Marketing Manager to help drive our product marketing efforts and bring Rollstack’s value proposition to life across channels.

You will work closely with Product, Sales, and Customer Success to translate product capabilities into compelling narratives that resonate with our target customers. From product launches to customer stories, you will play a key role in shaping how Rollstack communicates with the market.

This role is highly hands-on and ideal for someone who enjoys building, experimenting, and iterating quickly in a fast-growing startup environment. You will own the distribution of Rollstack’s story across channels, ensuring that our messaging reaches the right audiences and drives awareness, engagement, and pipeline.

You will report directly to our Growth Director and collaborate closely with teams across the company.




WHAT YOU WILL DO

 - Support and execute go-to-market launches for new product features and updates

 - Develop clear and differentiated product positioning and messaging

 - Create marketing content including: blog posts, case studies, product pages, sales collateral, customer stories, webinars and videos

 - Own the distribution of Rollstack’s story across channels, including LinkedIn, newsletters, product announcements, and community conversations

 - Ensure marketing content reaches the right audiences and drives awareness, engagement, and pipeline generation

 - Work closely with Product and Engineering to translate technical capabilities into clear customer value

 - Equip the Sales team with sales enablement materials, presentations, and messaging frameworks

 - Build customer advocacy assets including case studies, testimonials, and success stories

 - Manage and grow Rollstack’s social media presence, particularly on LinkedIn

 - Collaborate with Customer Success to identify customer wins, insights, and real-world use cases

 - Track and analyze the performance of marketing initiatives and campaigns to continuously improve messaging and distribution

 - Own key product marketing metrics, such as campaign performance, engagement, product adoption support, and marketing-sourced pipeline




WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

 - 3+ years of experience in Product Marketing, Growth Marketing, or Content Marketing in a SaaS or technology company

 - Strong content creation and storytelling skills, with the ability to simplify technical concepts

 - Experience developing product messaging, positioning, and marketing content

 - Proficiency with modern AI tools for marketing workflows, including: Claude, ChatGPT, video editing tools such as Nano Banana

 - Comfortable leveraging AI to accelerate research, content production, experimentation, and campaign velocity

 - Experience using marketing and sales t

source_jobs.title: Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
THE COMPANY

At Rollstack, we are redefining how organizations communicate data.

Companies invest millions into dashboards and analytics platforms, yet the most important decisions still happen through slide decks, documents, and executive reporting workflows. Leadership reviews, board decks, QBRs, operating reviews, investor updates, customer presentations — these workflows remain painfully manual inside even the most sophisticated organizations.

Rollstack automates that last mile.

We work with leading organizations ranging from fast-growing companies to enterprises like SoFi, Zillow, and Whirlpool to automate data-driven presentations and documents directly from tools like Tableau, Power BI, Looker, and Excel.

Headquartered in New York, Rollstack is remote-first and backed by Insight Partners and Y Combinator.

We operate with high intensity, high ownership, and high standards. We care deeply about craft, speed, and customer impact. We value intelligence, humility, curiosity, and people who want to build category-defining companies.




ABOUT THE ROLE

This is not a traditional SaaS AE role.

Rollstack sits at the intersection of analytics, executive communication, operations, and workflow automation. Selling Rollstack requires deeply understanding how organizations consume data — not just running a generic sales process.

We are looking for highly consultative, intellectually curious Account Executives who can diagnose complex reporting workflows, engage senior stakeholders, and help customers rethink how executive reporting gets done inside their organizations.

The ideal candidate is not just a “closer.” They are a strong operator, communicator, and problem solver who enjoys going deep with customers and navigating complex environments.

This role is ideal for someone coming from:

 - Tableau, Sigma, ThoughtSpot, Looker, Power BI, or modern data platforms

 - Management Consulting, Finance, Investment Banking, or other Strategy & Operations roles

 - Analytics or Data consulting

 - Technical pre-sales or customer-facing analytics roles looking to move into a commercial ownership role

You will work directly with the CEO and leadership team on key accounts and play a pivotal role in shaping how Rollstack scales its go-to-market motion.




WHAT YOU WILL DO

 - Own the full sales cycle from prospecting through close for mid-market and enterprise accounts

 - Engage with data, analytics, finance, operations, and executive stakeholders

 - Lead highly consultative discovery conversations around reporting workflows, executive communication, and operational processes

 - Guide customers through evaluations, pilots, and deployments

 - Partner closely with Engineering and Product teams during technical evaluations, security reviews, and implementation planning

 - Develop strong multi-threaded relationships across customer organizations

 - Collaborate directly with the CEO on strategic opportunities and large enterprise accounts

 - Contribute to refining Rollstack’s sales motion, messaging, and playbooks

 - Maintain rigorous pipeline management and operational discipline
   
   


WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 3+ years of experience in enterprise software, analytics, data, consulting, or customer-facing technical roles

 - Strong understanding of analytics, business intelligence, reporting, or operational workflows

 - Exceptional communication skills, both written and verbal

 - Executive presence and ability to engage senior stakeholders credibly

 - Strong intellectual curiosity and structured problem-solving ability

 - High ownership mentality with strong attention to detail

 - Comfortable operating in fast-moving, ambiguous startup environments

 - Ability to balance technical depth with commercial execution

 - Strong work ethic and bias toward action


STRONG PLUS

 - Background in Finance, Investment Banking, Management Consulting

 - Experience with the data stack: Tableau, Sigma, ThoughtSpot, Looker, Power BI, Sn

notes: Remote-friendly, backed by Insight Partners and Y Combinator
